description_long: This is a tall, rectangular monument featuring a high-relief sculpture of a robed human figure integrated into its front face. The figure is depicted in a classical style, with draped garments and a serene expression, standing against a background of horizontal grooves and topped with a row of decorative circular motifs. The sides of the monument are flat and unadorned, emphasizing the prominence of the sculpted front. The back is completely plain, lacking any ornamentation or detail. The base is slightly wider and features subtle chipping or wear, suggesting age or exposure to the elements. The entire structure appears to be made from a single block of light-colored stone, giving it a solid and monumental presence suitable for public or commemorative urban settings.
description: A tall, rectangular stone monument with a classical robed figure sculpted in high relief on the front, topped with decorative motifs and a plain, unadorned back.
description_view_0: Front view showing the detailed sculpted figure, draped garments, and decorative motifs at the top.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the depth of the relief sculpture and the flat, unadorned side surface.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a completely plain, flat surface with no ornamentation.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the profile of the relief and the flat side.
attribute_ornamentation: High-relief sculpture of a robed human figure on the front, with a row of circular decorative motifs at the top.
attribute_base_design: The base is rectangular, slightly wider than the shaft, and shows signs of chipping or wear. It is simple with no additional decorative features.
attribute_tip_design: The tip is flat and rectangular, topped with a row of circular motifs, lacking a pointed or pyramidal finish.
